nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives DRIVE_YEAR_READY events from MX_00_Event_Router

nodes.name: Parse Event Data
nodes.notes: Extracts event data and calculates step_key for project tree

nodes.name: Claim Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Atomic claim to prevent duplicate processing

nodes.name: Step Claimed?
nodes.notes: If claimed=true: proceed. If false: either DONE or IN_PROGRESS

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.project_number,
  p.name,
  p.object_street,
  c.company_name as client_name
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id
WHERE p.id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid;

nodes.name: Fetch Project
nodes.notes: Loads project details for folder naming

nodes.name: Prepare Folder Structure
nodes.notes: Builds folder name and subfolder list

nodes.name: Create Project Folder
nodes.notes: Creates main project folder in year folder

nodes.name: Extract Project Folder ID
nodes.notes: Extracts project folder ID for subfolder creation

nodes.name: Split to Subfolders
nodes.notes: Creates 9 items, one for each subfolder

nodes.name: Create Subfolder
nodes.notes: Creates each subfolder - runs 9 times in loop

nodes.name: Collect and Prepare DB
nodes.notes: Collects all subfolder IDs and builds SQL for DB insert

nodes.name: Insert Folder Records
nodes.notes: Inserts all folder records into project_drive_folders and updates projects

nodes.name: Complete Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Marks step as DONE with folder payload

nodes.name: Prepare Event Payload
nodes.notes: Prepares data for DRIVE_TREE_CREATED event

nodes.name: Emit DRIVE_TREE_CREATED
nodes.notes: Marks input event as processed and emits DRIVE_TREE_CREATED

nodes.name: Done (Main Path)
nodes.notes: Success response for main path

nodes.name: Handle Not Claimed
nodes.notes: Handles case when step was already claimed or done

nodes.name: Should Emit Event?
nodes.notes: If tree exists, we still need to emit DRIVE_TREE_CREATED for this project

nodes.name: Prepare Skip Emit
nodes.notes: Prepares data for event when skipping (tree exists)

parameters.query:
-- Mark input event as processed
UPDATE events SET processed_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $json.event_id }}'::uuid;

-- Emit next event (tree already exists from previous attempt)
INSERT INTO events (event_type, project_id, payload, source_system, source_flow)
VALUES (
  'DRIVE_TREE_CREATED',
  '{{ $json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  '{"project_folder_id": "{{ $json.project_folder_id }}", "reused": true}',
  'n8n',
  'M1_04b_Create_Project_Tree'
)
RETURNING id, event_type::text, project_id;

nodes.name: Emit DRIVE_TREE_CREATED (Skip)
nodes.notes: Emits event when tree already existed

nodes.name: Done (Skip Path)
nodes.notes: Success response for skip path

nodes.name: Done (Exit)
nodes.notes: Exit when step is in progress
